purpose: Finite endpoint-normalized sensitivity sweep before empirical parameter calibration

normalization.attraction: all attraction response shapes equal attraction_gain at A=1
normalization.defence: all defence response shapes equal floral_defence_efficacy at D=1
normalization.joint_cost: all joint-cost shapes equal attraction_defence_shared_cost at A=D=1

interpretation.tested_set_unanimous: Every evaluation in the summarized finite declared tested set has the same non-neutral sign. This is tested-set unanimity, not proof of mathematical structural robustness.
interpretation.mixed_or_sensitive: The finite tested set is not fully unanimous because signs differ, neutral evaluations occur, or an exact complementary/substitutable tie occurs.
interpretation.modal_sign_agreement: Continuous descriptive agreement among non-neutral evaluations; it is reported without an arbitrary majority classification threshold.
